raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to Pułku wiſſo/ kas
no Wihra-Kahrtas bija / weenu
Mehneſi un pahri / bija aſton-
tuhſtoſchi / un feſch-tints / kas
tahs fwehtas Weetas fargajamas
Leetas fargaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem Kaâta Dehlu Rad-
deein buhs klaht ta Dſihwokta/
prett Deenas-Widdus puffi / to
Lehgieri apneſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Kaâtiteru Raddu
tehwiſka NaminaWirſneeks/laid
irr Felizawans/ Uſijc̅ta Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee lai farga to Schkir-
ſtu/ un to Galdu/ un to Lukturi/
un tohs Altarus / un tahs fiveh-
tas Weetas Rihtue/ ar fo winni
to Darbu darra / un to Preekſch-
welkanu / un wiſſu/ kas winna
Darboſchanai peenahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to lewitisku Wirfnee-
fu Wirfneeks laid irr Eelenzars/
Aârona Dehls / tas Preeſteris /
wixta Uſrandſiſhana laid irr
us teem / kas tahs fwehtas Wee-
tas fargajamas Leetas farga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mo Meraraïrr/ to Maëli-
teru Raddi / un to Muſiteru
Raddi. Schee irr tee Raddi no
Merara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Pułks / kas
ſkaitihts tappe / wiſſi no Wihra-
Kahrtas/ weenu Mehneſi un pah-
ri wezzi / bija tſchetruhſtoſchi
un diwiſimts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Raddu no Merara
tehwiſka Namma Wirſneeks laid
irr Zuriêls/ Abikaita Dehls/teem
buhs klaht ta Dſihwokta / prett
Seemeli to Lehgieri apneſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Merara Dehleem buhs
uſrandſiht un fargaht / ta Dſih-
wokta Galdus/ un winna Kahrtis/un winna Stabbus/ un win-
na Kahjas / un wiſſus winna
Rihkus / un wiſſu/ kas winna
Darboſchanai peenahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka arri tohs Pagalma
Stabbus apfahrt / un winnu
Kahjas/ un winna Nagles/ un
winna Wirwes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem nu/kam Dſihwock-
Preekſcha prett Rihteem/ preekſ-
tahs Sa-eefchanas Telts / pret
Rihteem/to Lehgieri buhs apneſt
tee irr Mohsus un Aârons a
faweem Dehleem / tahs fwehta
Weetas fargajamas Leetas far-
gadami/to Iſraëta Behrnu Sar-
gafchanas Weeta / un tas Swe-
ſchineeks / kas tur pee-eet / tam
buhs mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſi Lewitu Pułki /
Mohsus un Aârons ſkaitija us t
KUNGA Wahrdu / pehz winna
Raddeeni/ wiſſi no Wihra-Kah-
tas / no teem Iſraëta Behrneemi
weenu Mehneſi un pahri / bi-
diwidefinits diwi tuhſtoſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runna
us Mohsu : Skaiti wiſſus Pirn-
dſimuſſchus no Wihra-Kahrtas
no Iſraëta Behrneem / weenu
Mehneſi un pahri / un dabſ
winno Wahrdо Pułku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs tohs Lewi-
tus preekſch man nemt / (es efi-
tas KUNGS) wiſſu Pirmdſin-
tu Weeta/ no teem Iſraëta Beh-
neem/un to Lewitu Lohpus/ wi-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
